title: Ego-team
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bf037","text":"We study how individuals' contribution to a team production task varies depending on whether the task is ego relevant or not. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"62k30","text":"We design and conduct an experiment to test the effect of ego-relevance when the team output depends on the top- and the bottom-performer of the group.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fukno","text":"Ego-relevance is manipulated by calling the Raven IQ Test an “IQ Task” or a “Pattern Task”. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6347t","text":"We find that the contribution, which corresponds to an contribution of intended effort in the task, is affected by ego-relevance and the team production function.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c5qno","text":"However, both effects are mediated by the expected teammate's contribution. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"69cl1","text":"Ego-relevance increases the responsiveness to the expected teammate's behavior, a behavior that is also more noticeable when the team output depends on the bottom-performer.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2taip","text":"Nevertheless, we do not observe crossed-effects between ego-relevance and the team production function.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Zahra Murad
